      Fields not relevant to the claim type may be left zero.
@notice $10 in an 18-decimals stablecoin.
@notice $15 — bond ($10) back to disputer + $5 reward from treasury.

@notice ~12 hours for governance to resolve before the bond can be
         reclaimed by the disputer. (Not enforced in v1; see notes.)
@notice At most one open dispute per proposal. proposalId → disputeId.

         one Pending or Disputed proposal at a time.

documentation.text: @notice Hash the caller must sign off-chain for registerWallet.

@notice Slim interface used by DisputeResolver to interact with the
         ScoreRegistry during the challenge → resolution flow.

@title PopId
 @notice Derives a `bytes32` popId directly from an EVM address.
 In the full PolkaCredit design, popId comes from the Polkadot PoP primitive
 (DIM1 / DIM2). For this MVP we short-circuit identity: every EVM address is
 treated as a PoP-verified human, and popId is a left-padded cast of the
 address. This keeps the contracts compatible with the real PoP primitive
 later — the only thing that changes is how popId is produced.

PopId.metadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.24+commit.e11b9ed9"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"PopId","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Derives a `bytes32` popId directly from an EVM address. In the full PolkaCredit design, popId comes from the Polkadot PoP primitive (DIM1 / DIM2). For this MVP we short-circuit identity: every EVM address is treated as a PoP-verified human, and popId is a left-padded cast of the address. This keeps the contracts compatible with the real PoP primitive later \u2014 the only thing that changes is how popId is produced.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/lib/PopId.sol":"PopId"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/lib/PopId.sol":{"keccak256":"0x90ca623b7e55d2f088aedfa802561a5dea5a481183c7fe3603e925fa6faa2f31","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://84e10f807b3a71c6388ff82d33e8c5ad17389d1f3672f5cf8c12c4a7bbcb0b71","dweb:/ipfs/QmP5hCoYVGs9x9tvQZEtfLc7p9UoRLFRVuZf8Fzjb8RU7b"]}},"version":1}
